---
title: "5.5 Exercise 2"
author: "Camilla Rosour"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Modern Data Science 5.5

Exercise 2:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(Lahman)

people <- People
batting <- Batting
pitching <- Pitching

```

a\)

```{r}
part_a <- people |>
  inner_join(batting, by = "playerID") |>
  group_by(playerID) |>
  filter(sum(HR) > 300 & sum(SB) > 300) |>
  group_by(nameFirst, nameLast) |>
  summarize(home_runs = sum(HR), SBs = sum(SB))
  
# there are 5 players under these parameters
```

b\)

```{r}
part_b <- pitching |>
  inner_join(people, by = "playerID") |>
  group_by(playerID) |>
  filter(sum(W) > 300 & sum(SO) > 3000) |>
  group_by(nameFirst, nameLast) |>
  summarize(wins = sum(W), strikeouts = sum(SO))
# there are 10 players under these parameters
```

c\)

```{r}
part_c <- people |>
  inner_join(batting, by = "playerID") |>
  group_by(playerID) |>
  filter(HR > 50) |>
  select(nameFirst, nameLast, yearID, HR)
  
  
```
